title: 2.5In x 10Yards Gold Velvet Wired Ribbon,Velvety Gold Crushed Ribbons for Gift Wrapping, Crafts Bow,Christmas Tree Decorations & Wreaths
features: 10-Yard Christmas Ribbon Kit：This set comes with 1 roll of Christmas velvet ribbon, measuring 10 yards (9m) long and 2.5in (6.3cm) wide. Ideal for ribbons for gift wrapping, ribbons for crafting, and various festive DIYs, it meets all your holiday decoration needs and can be cut to size.​

High Quality Velvet Material：Made from high quality velvet, this Christmas tree ribbon feels smooth and comfortable. It's highly durable, resistant to pulling and deforming, and features gold trims on both sides to maintain shape, suitable for long-term use.​

Wide Ribbon Applications：This wide ribbon is perfect for tree decoration, gift bows, wreath making, garland, tree topper bows, chair sashes, and home decor. It's also great as a gold ribbon for gift wrapping, adding elegance to any present.​

User-Friendly Roll Design：Our gold velvet ribbon is designed in a roll for easy use and storage. Whether for DIY projects or enhancing festive decor, its versatility extends to weddings, scrapbooking, and floral arrangements, and it's convenient for ribbon for balloons tasks.​

Gorgeous Shiny Decor for All Occasions：The Xmas wired ribbon shines brightly, fitting perfectly with Christmas, Halloween, weddings, parties, birthdays, or Valentine's Day decorations. It's sure to leave a deep impression on friends and family, making it necessary for any celebration.
